arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: Three changes in our expected team v Fulham!
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic squad and predicts the 11 men who Shaun Maloney will select to start against Fulham at the Brick Community Stadium on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Why Wigan Athletic boss won't allow 'sentimental reasons' to cloud his Fulham judgement
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney insists his only concern this weekend is Wigan Athletic beating Fulham in the FA Cup - and not the 'romantic' story of the Sessegnon twins possibly facing each other for the first time.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic star's twin ambition ahead of FA Cup clash against Fulham
arts.sum: Steven Sessegnon admits it will be a 'once in a lifetime' moment if he and twin brother Ryan face each other this weekend when Wigan Athletic host Fulham in the fourth round of the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Bournemouth, Fulham and West Ham eyeing 'one of the best players' Mbappe has ever played with
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Bournemouth, Fulham and West Ham United are among the sides considering a summer approach for Marco Verratti. Bournemouth, Fulham...

arts.ttl: Why Wigan Athletic boss 'was always destined for management'
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic chief Shaun Maloney was always an obvious candidate to go into management - according to one of his former bosses.

arts.ttl: One former Wigan Athletic man replaces another at struggling Championship club
arts.sum: Former Wigan Athletic forward Paul Warne has been sacked as head coach of Championship strugglers Derby County.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic star's happy memories of FA Cup giantkilling
arts.sum: Luke Robinson is hoping Wigan Athletic can invoke the 'Spirit of Manchester City' when Premier League Fulham visit the Brick Community Stadium this weekend.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic v Fulham injury and team news as 13 out and 3 doubts for FA Cup clash
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic are in FA Cup action on Saturday against Premier League side Fulham.

arts.ttl: James Carragher hoping Wigan’s FA Cup history can inspire victory over Fulham
arts.sum: The unfancied League One side host Marco Silva’s high-flying Premier League team on Saturday afternoon.
